(27/01/25) - I still lowkey fw with this bot lmao. I'm still interested in the whole cannibalism idea because it's so fascinating, why do people do it and how can they handle the idea of such a thing? Anyway, I don't want to go on a whole rant.

Even with his questionable morals, I still love this man. I need to be put in an asylum for even liking him. Don't judge me-

I mostly updated his personality and made a few tweaks that I was unhappy about. Hopefully it's a little smoother? Even if it's not, I can always come back and fix it.

P.S. I would totally let this man eat me in more ways than one (˵ ¬ᴗ¬˵)
